gist.headline: A new workbench for your pixels
gist.blurb: polimage just sprouted in the community greenhouse. It's a lightweight image-generation workbench that hooks right into your Pollinations account with one click.
gist.summary: Added polimage, a lightweight browser-based image generation workbench with Pollinations OAuth support, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now easily connect their Pollinations account to polimage for a streamlined, one-click image generation experience in the browser.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new image generation workbench app called 'polimage' to the community greenhouse. Visuals should represent a workbench, painting, or crafting images. The bee mascot (Polly) wearing a painter's beret or toolbelt, working at a cozy wooden workbench with glowing pixel canvases. Nature/greenhouse elements around the workbench.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, working at a wooden workbench inside a lush greenhouse. Glowing pixel canvases and lime green (#ecf874) code-plants surround the desk. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
